features.name: Jira Connection Setup
features.description: Handles plugin initialization and credential management for connecting Datagrok to a Jira instance via web service authentication.
features.evidence_summary: The autostart _init and info() share the infrastructure/lifecycle role; changelog entries for credential checks and initial NPM release confirm this is the connection-setup layer.

features.name: Jira Project Browser
features.description: Allows users to list all Jira projects and retrieve structured data for a specific project.
features.evidence_summary: projectsList and projectData share the 'project' name root and together cover listing and drilling into Jira projects.

features.name: Jira Ticket Retrieval
features.description: Fetches Jira issue data by key, by JQL filter, or in bulk, enabling users to query and import Jira tickets as structured data into Datagrok.
features.evidence_summary: issueData, getJiraTicketsByFilter, and getJiraTicketsBulk all retrieve Jira ticket content via different query modes (single key, JQL filter, bulk ID list); 'Added api' changelog entry marks their introduction.

features.name: Jira Field Info Panel
features.description: Renders Jira fields as a Datagrok info panel column, detecting one or multiple ticket IDs embedded in a cell and displaying linked ticket metadata inline.
features.evidence_summary: getJiraField produces a column from an object input and a field-name string, backed by info-panel platform docs and the changelog entry about detecting multiple tickets in a single cell.
